title: iris acutiloba subsp. lineolata
intro: Iris acutiloba subsp. lineolata, a lesser-known species of the iris plant, is a flowering plant native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Iris acutiloba subsp. lineolata include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and infections.
